Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Works: {len\(d[\\"works\\"]\)}'\); print\(f'With abstract: {sum\(1 for w in d[\\"works\\"] if w.get\(\\"abstract\\"\)\)}'\); w=d['works'][0]; print\(json.dumps\(w, indent=2\)[:500]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Works: {len\(d[\\"works\\"]\)}'\); abstracts=[w for w in d['works'] if w.get\('abstract'\)]; print\(f'With abstract: {len\(abstracts\)}'\); print\(f'Sources: {set\(w[\\"source\\"] for w in d[\\"works\\"]\)}'\)")
Bash(sqlite3 /Users/michael/Documents/Repositories/ScholRSS/journals/journals.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM journals; SELECT * FROM journals LIMIT 5;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/michael/Documents/Repositories/ScholRSS/journals/journals.db "SELECT j.issn_l, j.title, j.publisher, j.works_count FROM journals_fts fts JOIN journals j ON j.issn_l = fts.issn_l WHERE journals_fts MATCH 'nature' ORDER BY j.works_count DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/michael/Documents/Repositories/ScholRSS/journals/journals.db "SELECT j.issn_l, j.title, j.publisher, j.works_count, j.all_issns, j.country, j.is_oa FROM journals_fts fts JOIN journals j ON j.issn_l = fts.issn_l WHERE journals_fts MATCH 'comput law' ORDER BY j.works_count DESC LIMIT 5;")
